data.body:
AC-EVIDENCE / LANDING RECORD — change MERGED through Gerrit.

Change: https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/718 (Change-Id Idca2a4cd6299c77e5d53f17c894f69a6e7d9f71c)
Votes: LLM-Review +1 (PASS, 3 advisory/non-blocking findings) AND Verified +1 (CI SUCCESS, GH Actions run 29455775063). unresolved_comment_count=0.
Merged SHA on main: 72bb4965e3781259f2b9791c8d3c67c23c79e93d (clean fast-forward onto da7f11fc0). Submitted 2026-07-15 22:52:29 as RebarBotNava.
Diff: 322 insertions / 65 deletions across 13 files.

AC #1 — impact scoring pinned (missing/broken floor >=0.85; underspecified <=0.55 below 0.60; other three axes unchanged):
  src/rebar/llm/review_kernel/decide.py — ORACLE_GRADE01 = {none:0.0, underspecified_oracle:UNDERSPECIFIED_ORACLE_CONTRIB(0.55), broken_oracle:1.0, missing_oracle:1.0}; ac_unverifiable special-cased out of the generic _SEV01 contribs/override loops; has_override fires on broken_oracle/missing_oracle only.
  Pinned by tests/unit/test_impact_plan.py (three-grade + other-axis-unchanged cases) and tests/unit/test_oracle_grade_split.py::test_every_oracle_grade_is_accepted. Named-constant invariant (UNDERSPECIFIED_ORACLE_CONTRIB < min blocking threshold) asserted so future recalibration below 0.55 fails loudly.

AC #2 — plan-v3 version bump + grade persistence + legacy read + operator-attested enrich:
  IMPACT_MODEL_VERSION bumped plan-v2 -> plan-v3 in src/rebar/llm/plan_review/sidecar.py; pinned by tests/unit/test_impact_model_versioning.py.
  Grade persists per finding in REVIEW_RESULT sidecar: tests/unit/test_oracle_grade_split.py::test_grade_persists_in_sidecar_payload.
  Legacy plan-v2 records read as-is (segmentation back-compat): tests/unit/test_oracle_grade_split.py::test_legacy_plan_v2_sidecar_reads_as_is + tests/unit/_audit_page_helpers.py fixture.
  enrich_operator_attested clears missing/underspecified but never broken_oracle: src/rebar/llm/plan_review/workflow_ops.py, pinned by tests/unit/test_oracle_grade_split.py::test_attestation_clears_missing_and_underspecified_but_never_broken.
  Write-time closed-set enforcement (PlanSeverityAttrs.ac_unverifiable Literal): src/rebar/llm/review_kernel/verify.py + both verifier rubrics (plan_review_verifier.md, plan_review_verifier_agentic.md); out-of-vocabulary rejected — tests/unit/test_oracle_grade_split.py::test_out_of_vocabulary_grade_is_rejected.

AC #3 — docs + MERGED:
  docs/plan-review-gate.md documents the three-grade oracle-kind rule citing the calibration-3 floor-attribution evidence comment on this story (35.5% of plan-v2 blocks floor-driven; 56% underspecified-oracle). Change MERGED through Gerrit with LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 (above).
